DNSVisibility.description: Parsing method. The current return value can only be false.

NetworkType.description: Network type: Private: private network VPC. Public: public access.

SubnetId.description: Subnet ID. The subnet must belong to the selected availability zone.

AutoRenew.description: Whether to enable auto-renewal in prepaid scenarios. Values: true: auto-renewal. false: no auto-renewal.

ChargeEndTime.description: Billing expiration time for prepaid scenarios, format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ (UTC time)

ChargeStartTime.description: Billing start time. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ (UTC time)

ChargeStatus.description: Payment status: Normal: Normal. Overdue: Overdue. Shutdown: Shutdown

ChargeType.description: Billing type. PostPaid: Pay-as-you-go. PrePaid: yearly/monthly subscription

OverdueReclaimTime.description: Estimated release time when shut down due to overdue payment. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ (UTC time)

OverdueTime.description: Shutdown time for overdue payments. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ (UTC time).

PeriodUnit.description: Purchase period for prepaid scenarios. Month: monthly subscription. Year: annual subscription.

AutoAddNewNodes.description: Whether to allow automatic addition of new nodes. Values: true: yes. false: no.

ConsistLevel.description: Consistency level, applicable only to read-write mode connection endpoints. Values: Eventual: eventual consistency. Session: session consistency. Global: global consistency.

ConsistTimeout.description: When latency is high, the timeout for read-only nodes to synchronize the latest data, in microseconds (us). Range: 1us~100000000us

ConsistTimeoutAction.description: Timeout policy for read-only node data synchronization. Supports the following two policies: ReturnError: Returns SQL error (wait replication complete timeout, please retry). ReadMaster: Sends request to the primary node.

DistributedTransaction.description: Whether to enable transaction splitting. Only effective for read-write mode endpoints. Values: true: yes. false: no.

EndpointType.description: Connection endpoint type. Values: Cluster: default endpoint. Primary: primary node endpoint. Custom: custom endpoint.

MasterAcceptReadRequests.description: Whether the primary node accepts read requests. Applies only to read/write mode endpoints. true: Yes. false: No

NodeIds.description: Node list configured for the connection endpoint.

ReadWriteMode.description: Endpoint read/write mode. Options: ReadWrite: Read/write. ReadOnly: Read-only

DayKind.description: Maintenance cycle granularity. Default value: Week.

DayOfMonth.description: Specify which day of the month is the maintenance window. Default is empty, meaning every day is specified.

DayOfWeek.description: Which day of the week is the maintenance window. Default value is every day: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.

MaintenanceTime.description: Instance maintenance window. Format: HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ (UTC time).

FailoverPriority.description: Node failover priority. Range: 0~15. Higher values indicate higher priority

NodeType.description: Node type. Values: Primary: primary node. ReadOnly: read-only node.

vCPU.description: CPU size. For example, a value of 1 indicates a CPU size of 1U.

Key.description: User tag key. Length range: 1~128 characters. Allows input of characters from all languages, numbers, spaces ( ), underscores (_), periods (.), colons (:), slashes (/), equals (=), plus (+), hyphens (-), and @ (@). If the tag key starts or ends with a space, the system will automatically remove it

Value.description: User tag value. Allows input of characters from all languages, numbers, spaces ( ), underscores (_), periods (.), colons (:), slashes (/), equals (=), plus (+), hyphens (-), and @ (@). Case-sensitive. If the tag value starts or ends with a space, the system will automatically remove it

description: veDB MySQL Edition is Volcano Engine's self-developed next-generation cloud-native relational database. veDB MySQL Edition is fully compatible with MySQL and supports diverse enterprise database application scenarios.

CreatedTime.description: Instance creation time, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ (UTC time)

DBEngineVersion.description: Instance compatible version. Options: MySQL_8_0: Compatible with community MySQL 8.0. MySQL_5_7: Compatible with community MySQL 5.7

DBMinorVersion.description: Select the veDB MySQL minor version based on compatibility. When DBEngineVersion is set to MySQL_5_7, the default value for this parameter is 2.0. When DBEngineVersion is set to MySQL_8_0, the parameter value options are as follows: 3.0 (default): veDB MySQL stable version, 100% compatible with MySQL 8.0. 3.1: Native support for HTAP scenarios, accelerates complex queries. 3.2: Native support for HTAP scenarios, accelerates complex queries.

DeletionProtection.description: Whether deletion protection is enabled for the instance. Value range: enabled: enabled. disabled: disabled.

InstanceName.description: Instance name. Naming rules: Cannot start with a digit or hyphen (-). Can only contain Chinese characters, letters, digits, underscores (_), and hyphens (-). Length must be between 1 and 128 characters.

LowerCaseTableNames.description: Whether table names are case-sensitive. Value range: 0: table names are case-sensitive; backend stores according to actual table name. 1: table names are not case-sensitive; backend stores table names in lowercase.

NodeNumber.description: Number of instance nodes. Value range: 2–16.

Number.description: Number of instances to create. Range: 1~50. Default: 1

Port.description: Specify the private network port number for the default connection endpoint created for the instance. Default value is 3306. Value range: 1000–65534.

PrePaidStorageInGB.description: Total prepaid storage capacity, in GiB

ProjectName.description: Project name to which the instance belongs.

SpecFamily.description: Instance specification type. Values: General: general purpose. Exclusive: dedicated.

StorageChargeType.description: Storage billing type. If this parameter is not specified, the storage billing type defaults to the same value as the compute billing type. Values: PostPaid: pay-as-you-go. PrePaid: annual/monthly subscription (prepaid).

SubnetId.description: Subnet ID. The subnet must belong to the selected availability zone.

SuperAccountName.description: Account name for privileged user. Requirements: Must be unique, 2–32 characters. Letters, numbers, hyphens (-), and underscores (_) only. Must start with a letter and end with a letter or number. Cannot contain prohibited keywords

SuperAccountPassword.description: Password for high-privilege account. The password must meet the following requirements: can only contain uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters (such as ~!@#$%^&*_-+=`|\(){}[]:;'<>,.?/). Length must be between 8 and 32 characters. Must include at least three of the following: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, or special characters.

Tags.description: Array object of tag keys and tag values bound to the instance.

TimeZone.description: Instance time zone. The default time zone for all regions in China is UTC +08:00.
